speckit.name: Full SDD Cycle
speckit.description: Runs specify → plan → tasks → implement with review gates
speckit.author: GitHub

saas-feature.name: SaaS Feature Delivery Cycle
saas-feature.description: Production-grade feature delivery: scope → RFC → schema → DAL → services → tRPC → UI → E2E → quality gates → progressive rollout → observability
saas-feature.author: satcom

hotfix.name: Hotfix Delivery
hotfix.description: Fast-path bug fix: scope → implement → regression test → quality gates → staging → prod with mandatory gate. Skips RFC and feature-flag ceremony.
hotfix.author: satcom

migration-only.name: DB Migration Delivery
migration-only.description: Safe path for schema-only changes: scope → SQL review gate → apply local → quality gates → staging verify → prod-gate (DEPLOY confirm) → post-deploy verify. Supports additive, destructive, backfill, and index migration types.
migration-only.author: satcom
